2604.28018.title: Design Structure Matrix Modularization with Large Language Models
2604.28018.paper_summary: Design Structure Matrix (DSM) modularization, the task of partitioning system elements into cohesive modules, is a fundamental combinatorial challenge in engineering design. Traditional methods treat modularization as a pure graph optimization, without access to the engineering context embedded in the system. Building on prior work on LLM-based combinatorial optimization for DSM sequencing, this paper extends the method to modularization across five cases and three backbone LLMs. Our method achieves near-reference quality within 30 iterations without requiring specialized optimization code. Counterintuitively, domain knowledge, beneficial in sequencing, consistently impairs performance on more complex DSMs. We attribute this to semantic misalignment between the LLM's functional priors and the purely structural optimization objective, and propose the semantic-alignment hypothesis as a testable condition governing knowledge effectiveness with LLMs. Ablation studies identify the most effective input representation, objective formulation, and solution pool design for practical deployment. These findings offer practical guidance for deploying LLMs in engineering design optimization.
2604.28018.paper_summary_zh: 設計結構矩陣（DSM）模組化，即將系統元素劃分為凝聚模組的任務，是工程設計中的一個基本組合挑戰。傳統方法將模組化視為純粹的圖形優化，未考慮系統中嵌入的工程背景。在先前關於基於LLM的DSM排序的組合優化工作基礎上，本文將該方法擴展到五個案例和三個主幹LLM的模組化。我們的方法在30次迭代內達到接近參考質量，而不需要專門的優化代碼。反直覺的是，對於排序有益的領域知識，在更複雜的DSM上卻持續削弱性能。我們將此歸因於LLM的功能先驗與純結構優化目標之間的語義不一致，並提出語義對齊假設，作為一個可測試的條件，來規範知識在LLM中的有效性。消融研究確定了最有效的輸入表示、目標公式和解決方案池設計，以便於實際部署。這些發現為在工程設計優化中部署LLM提供了實際指導。
2604.28018.author: Shuo Jiang et.al.
